detectors.description:
Reentrancy in Vesting.setVesting(address,uint256,uint256) (Vesting.sol#345-363):
	External calls:
	- require(bool)(MELON_CONTRACT.transferFrom(msg.sender,this,ofMelonQuantity)) (Vesting.sol#353)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- vestingStartTime = now (Vesting.sol#355)
	Vesting.vestingStartTime (Vesting.sol#279) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Vesting.calculateWithdrawable() (Vesting.sol#303-321)
	- Vesting.isVestingStarted() (Vesting.sol#295)
	- Vesting.setVesting(address,uint256,uint256) (Vesting.sol#345-363)
	- Vesting.vestingStartTime (Vesting.sol#279)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [Vesting.setVesting(address,uint256,uint256)](Vesting.sol#L345-L363):
	External calls:
	- [require(bool)(MELON_CONTRACT.transferFrom(msg.sender,this,ofMelonQuantity))](Vesting.sol#L353)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [vestingStartTime = now](Vesting.sol#L355)
	[Vesting.vestingStartTime](Vesting.sol#L279) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [Vesting.calculateWithdrawable()](Vesting.sol#L303-L321)
	- [Vesting.isVestingStarted()](Vesting.sol#L295)
	- [Vesting.setVesting(address,uint256,uint256)](Vesting.sol#L345-L363)
	- [Vesting.vestingStartTime](Vesting.sol#L279)

detectors.description:
ERC20Interface.totalSupply().totalSupply (Vesting.sol#145) shadows:
	- ERC20Interface.totalSupply() (Vesting.sol#145) (function)

Vesting.setVesting(address,uint256,uint256).ofBeneficiary (Vesting.sol#345) lacks a zero-check on :
		- beneficiary = ofBeneficiary (Vesting.sol#361)

Reentrancy in Vesting.setVesting(address,uint256,uint256) (Vesting.sol#345-363):
	External calls:
	- require(bool)(MELON_CONTRACT.transferFrom(msg.sender,this,ofMelonQuantity)) (Vesting.sol#353)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- beneficiary = ofBeneficiary (Vesting.sol#361)
	- totalVestedAmount = ofMelonQuantity (Vesting.sol#357)
	- vestingPeriod = ofVestingPeriod (Vesting.sol#359)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [Vesting.setVesting(address,uint256,uint256)](Vesting.sol#L345-L363):
	External calls:
	- [require(bool)(MELON_CONTRACT.transferFrom(msg.sender,this,ofMelonQuantity))](Vesting.sol#L353)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [beneficiary = ofBeneficiary](Vesting.sol#L361)
	- [totalVestedAmount = ofMelonQuantity](Vesting.sol#L357)
	- [vestingPeriod = ofVestingPeriod](Vesting.sol#L359)

detectors.description:
Vesting.isVestingStarted() (Vesting.sol#295) uses timestamp for comparisons
